title: Telekinesis AddonPack
description: Unleash your mind’s full potential with Telekinesis and Psychic Abilities in Minecraft!
body:
🌌 Palladium Addon - Telekinesis Powers

Unleash your mind’s full potential with Telekinesis and Psychic Abilities in Minecraft! 🌀

⚡ Main Features

  • Master Telekinesis 🧠: Move blocks, launch mobs, and manipulate your surroundings with your mind.
  • Progression System 📈: Unlock three powerful abilities over 9 levels!
  • Psychic Shield & Boost 🛡️⚡: Defend against attacks and enhance your strength, speed, and resistance.
  • Advanced Energy System 🔋: Manage energy carefully or suffer from Telekinesis Sickness!
  • Configurable Mechanics 🛠️: Customize the settings.
  • Optimized for Multiplayer 🌍: Perfect for servers and cooperative gameplay!

🔮 How to Obtain Telekinesis Powers

To awaken your psychic abilities, you must perform a ritual using a Soul Campfire and a Cauldron filled with water. Follow these steps:

  1. Place a Cauldron on top of a lit Soul Campfire.
  2. Fill the Cauldron with water.
  3. Throw the following items into the Cauldron:
    • ⭐ Nether Star
    • 💎 Amethyst Shard
    • ✨ Glowstone Dust

💬 Join Our Community!

For more information, updates, and support, join our Discord server! 🚀
